couple.story: We met at a right time at a right place, and we have never left each other since then.

schedule.description: Warm reception with traditional aarti and floral welcome
A feast of traditional Rajasthani delicacies and fusion cuisine
Capturing golden hour moments by the palace lake
Dinner, dancing, and a night of memories under the stars
Time to exchange vows and become husband and wife

gallery.caption: A few moments from our journey

rsvp.message: Your presence would make our day more beautiful. Kindly let us know if you'll be joining us.

families.bride: Daughter of Mr. Surya Narayana & Mrs. Venkata Lakshmi
families.groom: Son of Mr. Srinivasu & Mrs. Madhu Meeneswari

footer.quote: Today I marry my best friend.
